idea-plugin.name: Android Drawable Preview
idea-plugin.description:
See your drawables, not file icons.

Replaces the default file icon for every drawable in your Project View with a real, rendered preview — so finding the right asset is a glance away instead of a guess. Works with both Android (res/drawable*, res/mipmap*) and Compose Multiplatform (composeResources/drawable*) projects, and supports XML drawables, vector, SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, and 9-patch.

What you get

  • Inline thumbnails in the Project View, with a hover tooltip showing dimensions, density bucket, and file size.
  • Right-click ⇒ Show Drawable Preview opens a 256px popup with switchable backgrounds (light, dark, checkered, transparent), adaptive-icon mask shapes (circle, squircle, rounded square, square), selector state tabs, density-variant comparison, dominant-color palette, and Copy as PNG.
  • Editor gutter icons next to R.drawable.foo and Res.drawable.foo references — click to jump to the file.
  • Find Drawable Usages right-click action and an Unused drawable resource inspection to keep your res/ folder clean.
  • Status-bar toggle to flip previews on or off without leaving your editor.

Built for performance

Renders are cached and dispatched off the EDT through IntelliJ's deferred-icon machinery, so even resource folders with thousands of drawables stay smooth.

Resource Manager tool window

The dedicated Drawables tool window lists every previewable resource in the project as a searchable, filterable grid. Group by source folder or kind, sort by name / kind / size, drag a cell directly into your source to insert R.drawable.foo, right-click for actions (Open / Reveal / Find Usages / Copy Path). State persists across IDE restarts.

Originally forked from mistamek/drawable-preview; rewritten for Android Studio Panda (2025.3) and newer.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.3.0

  • New Drawables tool window — Compose-based searchable grid of every drawable in the project. Filter by name and kind, group by source folder or kind, sort by name / kind / size. Header shows count + total file size for the current view.
  • Drag-and-drop from the tool window into any source file inserts R.drawable.<name>.
  • Right-click on a tool-window cell: Open in Editor, Reveal in Project View, Find Drawable Usages, Copy Path.
  • Filter and layout state persists across IDE sessions.
  • Auto-refresh: the tool window re-scans on VFS changes (file add / delete / rename in any drawable folder).
  • Fix: ReadAction.compute deprecation warning from the JetBrains Plugin Verifier.
  • Compatibility: sinceBuild lifted to 253 (Android Studio Panda, IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3). Users on Meerkat or Narwhal stay on 1.2.0.

1.2.0

  • Compose Multiplatform support — recognises composeResources/drawable*/ folders and Res.drawable.foo references.
  • Right-click "Show Drawable Preview" popup with switchable backgrounds, adaptive-icon mask shapes, selector state tabs, density-variant comparison, color palette, and copy-to-clipboard.
  • Editor gutter icons for R.drawable.foo and Res.drawable.foo references.
  • Project-View tooltip with embedded 96px thumbnail and metadata.
  • "Find Drawable Usages" right-click action.
  • "Unused drawable resource" inspection.
  • Status-bar widget for the master enable/disable toggle.
  • Static-frame preview of <animated-vector> drawables.
  • Adaptive icons render with a launcher-style mask (circle by default).
  • 9-patch (.9.png) markers stripped from previews.
  • Cached, deferred rendering — no more EDT stalls in the Project View.
  • Migrated to IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin 2.x; targets Android Studio Meerkat (2024.3) and newer; Java 21.
  • Numerous fixes: layer-list crash on zero padding, cross-type resource resolution, classloader collisions with bundled Xerces, non-Android module rendering, XXE hardening, case-insensitive extension matching.

Earlier

  • 1.1.10 Added plugin icon
  • 1.1.9 Support for Koala (241)
  • 1.1.8 Support for Jellyfish (233)
  • 1.1.7 Support for Hedgehog
  • 1.1.6 Added support for SVG icons
  • 1.1.5 Added support for Android Studio 4.1
  • 1.1.4 Fixed mipmap parsing, fixed NPE
  • 1.1.3 Increased icons size for macOS, fixed vector render
  • 1.1.2 Fixed icon replacement with other plugins; macOS icon rendering
  • 1.1.1 Bug fixes; decreased minimum IntelliJ version
  • 1.1 Added XML drawables
  • 1.0 Initial release with binary and vector drawables

action.description: Open a larger preview of this drawable on a switchable background
Find all R.drawable / Res.drawable / @drawable references to this file
